data.title: ‘Truth has won and justice prevailed’, says Congress after Supreme Court grants anticipatory bail to Pawan Khera
data.description: The Supreme Court has granted Congress leader Pawan Khera anticipatory bail in a criminal case instituted on a complaint filed by Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa’s wife, saying the case appears to be motivated by political rivalry and does not warrant custodial interrogation

data.title: ‘Election Bill’: Rahul slams government on commercial LPG price hike
data.description: The Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha said he had warned that the heat of inflation would strike after the elections

data.title: Ladakhis proved to be first line of defence when country faced external threats: Amit Shah
data.description: The Union Home Minister inaugurated the sacred holy relics exposition of Tathagata Buddha and the 2569th Buddha Purnima celebrations in Leh during his two-day visit to Ladakh

data.title: ‘Jetlee’ movie review: Ritesh Rana’s aviation comedy is an ordeal to sit through
data.description: The Satya-starrer takes potshots at everything and oversells its quirks to the point of exhaustion

data.title: Elephant brought to temple turns violent, kills one, injures mahout
data.description: An elephant flipped over a car several times, destroying it, and also damaged a few two-wheelers present there, even as an Elephant Squad of the Forest Department tried to capture the jumbo before it moved out from the temple premises to a more populated area, says police

data.title: Inside TIMS Sanathnagar: A hospital tests its flow, one patient at a time on first day of trial run
data.description: The government health facility, spread over 22 acres, is scheduled for inauguration on June 2

data.title: This Maharashtra Day, tribal villages affected by Maoism has road, electric borewell for the first time since independence
data.description: Binagunda is so remote that there is no State Transport Bus connectivity there as yet

data.title: Above-normal heatwave days likely in some parts of India in May: IMD
data.description: In a statement, Director General of Meteorology, IMD, Mrutyunjay Mohapatra, said, "During May 2026, minimum temperatures are expected to be above normal across many parts of the country."

data.title: All set for vote counting in Kozhikode district
data.description: All set for vote counting in Kozhikode district

data.title: Kshatriya Parishad pays tributes to P.V.G. Raju on birth anniversary in Vizianagaram
data.description: The MANSAS Trust founder and last king of the Vizianagaram princely State was remembered on Friday (May 1, 2026) for his contribution to the city’s education sector

data.title: Farooq Abdullah claims lack of support within INDIA bloc on restoration of J&K Statehood
data.description: National Conference president Farooq Abdullah urged the alliance to move beyond being a mere electoral pact, calling for more frequent meetings to address the "ignored" future of the nation.

data.title: Cancel Labour Codes, fix ₹26,000 as minimum monthly wage: Left parties at Srikakulam May Day rally
data.description: CITU State secretary P. Tejeswara Rao said minimum wages had not been revised in 15 years, even as workers were being forced to put in 12-hour days for meagre pay

data.title: This May Day reminds workers to be more organised, says Kerala Chief Minister
data.description: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan said that even as neoliberal policies that undermine workers’ rights sweep across India, the voices of protest are emerging from the labour sector, which is very hopeful.

data.title: Bengaluru hotels to hike prices again after commercial gas cylinder price goes up from ₹2,162 to ₹3,152
data.description: The price of a commercial LPG cylinder has seen an unprecedented hike of over 70% in just 60 days in Bengaluru, with three hikes and a withdrawal of ₹150 discount during this period

data.title: Ravi K. takes charge as HAL CMD
data.description: He concluded various big-ticket contracts for HAL, including the contract to supply 180 LCA Tejas to the Indian Air Force, 156 LCH Prachand to the Indian Army and Indian Air Force, and is credited with the operationalisation of the LCA Tejas fleet in IAF

data.title: Documentary on K.C. Venugopal reportedly the latest ‘casualty’ in the ‘tussle’ for post-poll UDF leadership
data.description: However, he added, media reports that the high command had issued an “extraordinary fiat” to stop the work on the documentary directed by Vinod Mankara had no factual basis. However, the AICC has issued a “general direction” requesting that the rank-and-file desist from promoting individual party leaders on social and conventional media.

data.title: c New Corporations, same old problems
data.description: It has been eight months since the five corporations came into being in Bengaluru, in place of one large civic body. The number of wards have almost doubled from 198 to 369, expected to take governance closer to citizens. But has it really been the case, finds out Chetan B.C.

data.title: Supreme Court grants anticipatory bail to Congress leader Pawan Khera
data.description: On Thursday (April 30, 2026), the Bench reserved Mr. Khera’s plea for pre-arrest bail for judgment after hearing submissions from both sides

data.title: Kalaburagi artist M.G. Doddamani selected for Lalithakala Academy honorary award

data.title: Ancient ritual continues at Poonjar Palace as Mangaladevi festival draws devotees
data.description: According to legend, the decline of the Poonjar dynasty began after the original temple, which was once under the kingdom’s jurisdiction, fell into ruin

data.title: Inquiry panel gives clean chit to IPS officer Sujith Das in controversial phone call row
data.description: Mr. Das had been suspended from service in September 2024 when he was serving as the District Police Chief (Pathanamthitta), shortly after Mr. Anvar publicly released audio clips and made disclosures alleging misconduct by the officer
